title: Pleurothallopsis powersii
taxonomy: Pleurothallopsis powersii is classified within the family Pleurothallidinae, which is a subfamily of orchids. This subfamily is part of the larger family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The genus Pleurothallopsis is itself part of the tribe Epidendreae, which contains over 30,000 species of orchids. The species Pleurothallopsis powersii is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants for support. It is native to Central America and is often found growing in tropical forests and woodlands.
